label: natural number (the sort N)
gloss: the sort of natural numbers 0, 1, 2, ...; the domain the Peano core axiomatises.
notes: Primitive of the profile-M v0 basis (design-math-sector.md SS2.2, SS3.2); pinned to the bundle's basis table, analogous to a profile-1 prime record.

nsmBridge.note: 'number' has no NSM prime; NSM practice reaches counting only through molecules (Goddard 2010). Recorded as none rather than pretending.
